title: Pear Melange Grilled Salad
description: A salty and silky vegetarian-friendly Mexican dish featuring grilled pears in a crowd-pleasing salad.

ingredients.name: Grilled Pears
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe but not mushy pears.

ingredients.name: Cilantro-Lime Vinaigrette
ingredients.notes: Mixes well with the coconut lime yogurt dressing.

ingredients.name: Mixed Greens
ingredients.notes: Any type of mixed greens can be used.

ingredients.name: Fresh Mint Leaves
ingredients.notes: To add freshness to the dish.

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Optional for additional crunch and flavor.

ingredients.name: Pomegranate Seeds
ingredients.notes: For a pop of color and sweetness.

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Wash the pears, cut them into chunks, and brush them with oil. Grill for about 10 minutes or until they are tender and charred on some parts.
In a mixing bowl, combine grilled pears, mixed greens, chopped avocado, mint leaves, red onion (if using), and pomegranate seeds.
Mix in the coconut lime yogurt dressing and cilantro-lime vinaigrette. Toss gently to combine.
Divide the salad among plates and serve immediately.
